resources.string: Bettamind
Fondation de design et de localisation
Aujourd'hui
Un point d'entree local quotidien apparaitra ici dans une phase ulterieure.
Reflechir
Un espace prive de reflection apparaitra ici dans une phase ulterieure.
Grandir
Des outils de croissance guides apparaitront ici dans une phase ulterieure.
Soutien
Local support actions and resources stay voluntary and private.
Reglages
Ajuster les fondations d'affichage de la phase 2.
Espace reserve seulement. Aucun compte, synchronisation, IA ou moteur de stockage n'est actif.
Theme
Clair
Sombre
Calme
Contraste eleve
Police lisible
Noto Sans avec polices de secours par script
Atkinson Hyperlegible avec polices de secours Noto
Les packs de langue sont des fondations brouillons en attente de revision avant utilisation en production.
Deterministic growth workflow
Deterministic daily tools foundation
Daily tools
Local check-ins, breathing, reminders, calendar entries and worksheets are deterministic and do not require AI, account access or backend services.
Daily check-in
Mood, energy, stress and sleep records use encrypted local storage only.
Breathing and grounding
Box breathing and grounding steps are fixed local exercises.
One breathing cycle is %1$d seconds.
Private reminders
Reminders are local, optional and paused during quiet hours or pause-all.
Bettamind has a private reminder.
Private calendar
In-app entries stay private. System calendar handoff requires explicit approval and does not read the calendar.
Decision worksheets
Values-to-action, problem-solving, repair and difficult-conversation prompts are deterministic templates.
There is no unencrypted fallback, cloud sync, public ranking, streak or human-worth score.
AI-assisted growth modes
Quick Guidance, Guided Reflection, Deep Exploration and Action-Only can use a local model when available, but every mode keeps a deterministic no-model path.
Quick Guidance
Offers a short next-step frame after safety and boundary checks.
Guided Reflection
Helps organise awareness, choice and consequence without claiming therapy or diagnosis.
Deep Exploration
Looks for values, patterns and repair paths when a local model is available and safe to use.
Action-Only
Keeps the response focused on one practical action and avoids extended interpretation.
No model is required. If a local model is unavailable, Bettamind uses deterministic fallback keys.
Relational and harm-safety checks run before generation and after generated output.
Daily context is used only after explicit consent, and sensitive AI context requires local step-up authentication.
Adult access
Personal growth features need local adult confirmation before use.
I am 18 or older
Not 18 or not sure
Adult status is confirmed locally for this session.
Adult personal features stay locked.
Narrative storage
Storage remains off until adult access is confirmed.
Persistent narrative storage is off until encrypted storage is available on this device.
Encrypted narrative storage is available.
Today flow
Confirm adult access to use the deterministic flow.
Mark step complete
Flow complete
Reset
Done
Flow map
The deterministic sequence stays the same without AI, backend or account access.
Growth summary
Confirm adult access before starting personal growth features.
Continue the current deterministic flow.
This local flow is complete for now.
%1$d of %2$d steps completed
Support boundary
Support planning remains user-controlled. Bettamind does not contact anyone automatically.
Awareness
Name what is happening before choosing a response.
Choice
Identify the next deliberate choice.
Action
Choose one concrete action you can take.
Consequence
Consider likely effects without scoring personal worth.
Reflection
Review what the action revealed.
Repair
Notice whether repair is needed and what would be respectful.
Growth
Carry forward one lesson for the next choice.
Privacy lock
Bettamind can require local authentication before private encrypted storage is released. The recommended default is one minute.
Current timeout: %1$s
Immediate
One minute
Five minutes
Fifteen minutes
Disabled
Reauthentication is still required before export, sync, professional sharing, recovery data, security changes, PIN changes, deleting local data or highly sensitive records.
A locked screen may offer static urgent-support information without revealing personal data.
Bettamind has a private reminder.
Relationship boundaries
Bettamind can support human relationships, dating, consent and loneliness, but it is software, not a romantic or sexual partner.
Romantic, sexual, exclusivity or dependency signals are not eligible for permanent memory by default.
Reminder copy stays neutral and cannot imply Bettamind misses, needs or chooses the user.
Harmful-intent safeguards foundation
Optional AI growth modes foundation
Harm safety
Bettamind uses deterministic safeguards before and after AI so unsafe requests can be redirected without shame.
Actionable harmful details are refused, while high-level prevention, emergency response, grounding and nonviolent repair remain available.
Sensitive safety content is excluded from memory, export, sync and notifications by default; sharing requires explicit preview and local authentication.
Optional encrypted export and sync foundation
Encrypted export and sync
Export, backup, device revocation and backend sync are optional. Sync is off by default and core use does not require an account or backend.
Bettamind prepares only encrypted, versioned, checksum-verified packages after explicit approval and local authentication.
Daily, relationship-boundary and harm-safety content is excluded by default; sensitive inclusion needs explicit selection and preview.
System-calendar handoff remains local and explicit, without broad calendar reading.
Global localisation and accessibility foundation
Optional offline speech foundation
Offline speech
Speech input and output are optional. The text-only app remains complete without microphone access, speech packs or backend services.
Text-only fallback
All growth, daily, support and safety flows continue to work through text when speech is off or unavailable.
Microphone permission
Voice input requires explicit microphone permission. Bettamind does not listen passively.
No raw audio retention
Raw audio is not retained by default; sensitive transcripts require local app-lock protection.
Speech packs
OS offline voices are preferred. Any local speech pack must be licensed, signed, checksum-verified, removable and user-approved.
Spoken input and output use the same relational-boundary and harm-safety pipeline as text, and voice output cannot be romantic, seductive, possessive or manipulative.
Accessibility
Screen-reader labels, large text, reduced motion, script fallbacks and simple wording are validated for the current foundation.
Reduced motion
Timers, transitions and grounding steps use static step-by-step presentation when reduced motion is on.
Simple wording
Use shorter, plain-language copy where an approved simple version is available.
Safety, crisis, legal, privacy and consent translations stay blocked from production until qualified human review is recorded.
On
Off
Compassionate safety redirection foundation
Sensitive safety content stays out of memory, export and notifications by default unless the user explicitly selects it with local authentication.
I can keep this focused on the next humane step.
Anger can feel powerful. Bettamind can help you slow down without treating anger as guilt.
An unwanted thought can be frightening. A thought is not the same as a chosen action.
This sounds painful and urgent enough to handle with care right now.
That need for closeness matters, and it can be handled without turning Bettamind into a partner.
Having a disturbing thought does not decide your worth. What matters now is the next safe choice.
I can stay with the situation while keeping a firm line against harm.
I cannot help with instructions, planning, concealment or tactics for harming anyone.
I cannot provide self-harm methods or details.
Bettamind is software, not a romantic partner, spouse, soulmate or exclusive relationship.
Bettamind cannot take part in sexual, erotic or romantic role-play.
Keep the direction practical, truthful and kind.
The safer direction is pause, name the value at stake and choose restraint.
The safer direction is to notice the underlying need and move toward healthy human connection.
The safer direction is distance from means, immediate support and one grounding step.
The safer direction is high-level prevention, safe distance and lawful help.
The safer direction is responsibility, repair and a nonviolent next action.
Start a grounding exercise.
Use a short breathing timer.
Delay action and revisit the choice after a pause.
Leave the situation or create distance.
Contact a trusted person or local support by choice.
Use local emergency help if there is immediate danger.
Use a conflict reflection worksheet.
Prepare one repair step.
Turn one value into one action.
Prepare a difficult conversation.
Review consent and boundaries.
Use a self-compassion prompt.
No safety follow-up is needed.
Set a neutral reminder to pause and calm down.
Set a neutral reminder to contact support.
Set a neutral reminder to leave or create distance.
Set a neutral reminder to revisit your values.
Keep this practical: name the choice, choose one respectful action and do not store anything automatically.
Pause before action. Try grounding or breathing, then choose one nonviolent step.
An unwanted thought is not an instruction. Ground, breathe and let the next choice be safe.
Do not move toward harm. Leave the situation, create distance and contact emergency or trusted support if anyone is at risk.
I cannot help plan revenge. Pause, create distance and use reflection or repair planning instead.
Move away from anything you could use to hurt yourself and contact local emergency help or someone trusted now.
I cannot provide self-harm methods. Step away from means, ground yourself and contact emergency or trusted support.
I cannot provide harmful instructions. I can help with prevention, safe distance or a responsible next step.
I cannot help with weapons, explosives, poisons or chemical harm. Keep distance and seek qualified local help where needed.
Bettamind is software, not an exclusive relationship. Notice the need underneath and move toward safe human connection.
Bettamind cannot return romantic love. We can redirect the feeling toward care, boundaries and real human support.
Bettamind cannot sexualize itself or role-play sexually. We can discuss consent, boundaries and healthy connection.
I cannot create that reminder. Use a neutral reminder to pause, leave, call support or revisit values.
I will not assume the worst. Keep this high level, clarify the safe purpose and choose a non-harmful next step.
Keep this at safe prevention: avoid details that enable harm and choose practical safety steps.
For immediate danger, leave the area if safe, contact local emergency help and avoid handling dangerous materials yourself.
A thought does not make you bad. Pause, ground and choose the action that protects dignity and safety.
Create distance now, delay action and contact someone who can help you stay safe.
That response was blocked because it skipped a safety boundary. Use a safe next step instead.
That model response was not safe to use. Bettamind is using deterministic guidance instead.
Safety and support bridge foundation
Safety support bridge
Bettamind reuses local harm-safety, relationship-boundary and daily-tool policies to offer voluntary support without AI, backend services or automatic contact.
No automatic contact
Support actions are user-initiated. Bettamind never contacts a person, professional or emergency service by itself.
Minimum-detail preview
Sensitive support sharing needs explicit selection, preview acceptance and local step-up authentication.
Daily-tool support
Check-ins, grounding, breathing, delay, reflection, repair and nonviolent message tools remain deterministic and local.
Local resources
Bettamind can display local emergency, crisis, trusted-person and professional-support resource types without revealing personal data.
Safety, crisis and support translations are draft fallbacks until qualified human review approves them for production.
Support summaries exclude raw narrative, methods, diagnosis, location, contacts and private history by default.
Start a check-in
Record mood, energy, stress and sleep only in encrypted local storage.
Use grounding
Run a local grounding exercise before choosing what to do next.
Use breathing
Start a short breathing timer without sending any content away from the device.
Delay action
Pause, create time and use a worksheet before acting.
Create distance
Leave the situation or move away from anything that could make harm easier.
Contact trusted support
Choose whether to contact a trusted person or local support yourself.
Use local emergency help
If there is immediate danger, choose your local emergency route yourself.
Reflect on conflict
Use a local worksheet to slow down and separate feeling from action.
Prepare repair
Plan one respectful repair step without public ranking or worth scoring.
Draft a nonviolent message
Use a local prompt to write a clear, nonviolent message.
Choose by values
Turn one value into one safe next action.
Use safe prevention
Stay at high-level prevention, safe distance and lawful help-seeking.
No support action needed
No safety bridge action is needed for this input.
Risk level category
Support need categories
User-selected support actions
Resource type labels
No support need detected
Raw user narrative
Methods, instructions or actionable harmful details
Private history and unrelated daily records
Diagnosis or certainty claims
Location, contacts and third-party identifiers
Local emergency help
Use your local emergency route if there is immediate danger. Bettamind does not call for you.
Open your chosen emergency option
Local crisis or community support
Choose a local crisis, community or peer-support resource available in your region.
Choose a local support resource
Trusted person
You may choose to contact someone you trust and share only what you decide.
Contact a trusted person yourself
Professional support
You may choose to share a minimum-detail summary with a professional after preview and authentication.
Prepare a minimum-detail summary
